steps.title: Use the scale contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts strong effects on individual consumers with effects at the national-economy level. The GDP example says the national effect was only slightly greater than zero, so the blank needs a word meaning muted or limited.

steps.title: Reject different dimensions
steps.content:
• Choice A concerns duration, not size of effect.
  • Choice C says the effects are helpful, but the passage discusses magnitude.
  • Choice D concerns inconsistency, not a small national effect.

steps.title: Choose the muted-effect word
steps.content: Subdued means muted or restrained, matching an effect only slightly greater than zero. The answer is B.
